commands.review_summary:
This PR expands `localModelLean` to deny additional web, media, session, node, channel, and orchestration tools, adds focused lean-mode tests, and updates config help plus local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +55, Docs +7. Total +86 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. for a PR review: the branch changes an experimental config behavior and includes focused tests rather than reporting a standalone current-main bug reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual maintainer review is needed because the PR is draft, maintainer-labeled, and changes the behavior of an existing experimental config flag for upgrades.

target.title: fix(agents): broaden local model lean profile
target.body:
## Summary
- broaden `localModelLean` so small/local models avoid heavyweight web, media, session orchestration, node, channel, and subagent tool families
- keep core coding/status tools available in lean mode and cover the retained/trimmed surface with focused tests
- refresh config help and local-model docs so the operator-facing contract matches the broader lean profile

## Verification
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.hints.test.ts src/config/plugins-runtime-boundary.test.ts` - 5 files / 55 tests passed on commit `1c0a50b1`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts`
- `./.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` - clean
- Crabbox AWS Linux changed gate: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --timing-json --shell -- "corepack pnpm check:changed"`, run `run_f96a4161f2e5`, lease `cbx_2855c9af68d6`, slug `tidal-shrimp`, exit 0. `origin/main` moved afterward; branch was cleanly rebased and the focused sanity checks above were rerun on `1c0a50b1`.

Behavior addressed: small/local model lean mode now removes broader high-latency/high-schema tool families while preserving core coding/status tools.

Real environment tested: local focused test/docs/lint sanity and AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: listed in Verification.

Evidence after fix: lean-mode tests assert heavyweight web/media/session/node/orchestration tools are removed and core coding/status tools remain; Crabbox changed gate passed.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean` exposes a smaller, less brittle tool surface for constrained models.

What was not tested: live Ollama model-family API smoke in this first focused PR; that remains for the follow-up compatibility/proof slice.
target.author: vincentkoc
